message:
feat: add uninstall parity with safe cleanup modes

- Add src/cli/uninstall.rs with CleanupMode-driven removal pipeline
  (Conservative, KeepData, KeepConfig, KeepAssets, Purge)
- 14 RemovalCategory variants covering all sbh footprint types
- Backup-first semantics before destructive operations
- Dry-run support for previewing removal plans
- Profile line removal for shell RC files
- Includes concurrent agent changes (wizard.rs, from_source.rs fixes)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
